_readme: Hand-verified anchor table for Ascension's Spell.dbc SpellClassSet family ids. Not auto-generated - only add an entry here after empirically confirming it (checked that a class's talents/spells share this SpellClassSet, and that at least one modifies/SpellClassMask match against it holds up). See Docs/PIPELINE.md section 9 for the mechanism this supports.

29.note: Entire Necromancer kit (talent-tree stubs, implementation spells, and modifier auras alike) uses SpellClassSet=29 uniformly. Confirmed via build_abilities_reference_dbc.py: 180 player-facing abilities surfaced from the tree, 133 of them linked via modifies-relationship SpellClassMask matches scoped to this family id.

matchesConfirmed: Animate: Skeletal Archer (805040, SpellClassMask_0=2097160, includes bit 8)

confirmedGaps.note: Relationship types confirmed NOT present in Spell.dbc for any family - stay text-only/manual-tag territory (see PIPELINE.md section 8's 'regex can't own' bucket).

examples.relationship: Buffs Ghoul crit/haste conditional on live Abomination count
examples.finding: SpellClassMask and EffectSpellClassMask_A/B/C all zero on its own record - implemented as custom server-side scripting (pet-type check at runtime), invisible to client data.

examples.relationship: Its own text: 'Your Animate: Skeletal Archers now summons 1 additional Skeletal Archer.'
examples.finding: Real effects (effect0/effect1) are dummy/proc auras with MiscValue 3/12, not a spell-ID reference - no classmask anywhere on the live effect slots. A separate, UNUSED effect2 slot (Effect_2=0) carried a stale leftover EffectSpellClassMask that produced 5 false-positive matches against unrelated Raise spells until the matcher was fixed to require Effect_e != 0. See PIPELINE.md section 9 correction note.

implementationNotes.deadEffectSlotGuard: When scanning EffectSpellClassMask_A/B/C_<e> for a modifier candidate, always check Effect_<e> != 0 first. A zero-value Effect slot (SPELL_EFFECT_NONE) can still carry a non-zero, stale EffectSpellClassMask value - almost certainly inherited from whatever template spell was cloned to author the new one. Confirmed on Skeletal Artillery (see confirmedGaps above); caused 21 of the original 41 candidate 'modifier' talents to be pure false positives before this guard was added.
